title: Eerily Slow
body:
I realized that this is not something i can work on anymore. I will be making datapacks in the future,maybe just not this tyle anymore. But who knows?

# only download the datapack version! the mod version is broken at the moment.



# Eerily Slow 🐌
****Do you want to make your world slower and more challenging?****

- Eerily Slow is a progression datapack that rebalances some of Minecraft’s core recipes to stretch out the early and mid-game.

- **!!This datapack supports GeyserMC!!**
- want to get the resource pack and mappings? go to my discord server and ask for it!

- The discord server linked is for bug tracking,reporting and feedbacks.

Changes Include:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

🪨 **Stone Tools** → now require **stone** instead of cobblestone.  

![look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eed9a881609f2f12997eb32f5a2a8d4e48bd45e5.png)  

🔥 **Furnace** → crafted with **bricks** around **coal** in the middle.  

![look closely](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/257e59a1cbdadbd563d518f9072ac88f7257f344.png)  

🛡 **Shield** → needs an **iron block** plus logs.  

![look again](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fefebbcaa2ec3e1f75bee9f17d1deab28bad2eae.png)  

🧱 **Clay Ball** → must be smelted on a **campfire** to get bricks.  

⚒ **Blast Furnace** → requires an **iron block**.  

🌲 **Wood Planks** → can only be crafted from the **stripped version** of their logs.  

</details>

How do i progress through early game then?
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

How to Get Started in Eerily Slow

• Collect Flint and Sticks

Break leaves to get sticks.

Find flint from gravel.


• Craft a Flint Blade

Use the flint and sticks you collected to craft your first Flint Blade.


• Gather Saplings for Plant String

Use your Flint Blade to break leaves and collect saplings.

Craft Plant String from the saplings.


• Craft a Flint Axe

Use the Plant String and Flint Blade to craft a Flint Axe.

Chop wood with your Flint Axe to craft a Crafting Table.


• Collect and Smelt Clay

Find clay blocks and break them to get clay balls.

Smelt the clay balls in a campfire for 5 minutes to make Bricks.


• Make a Furnace

Use the Bricks you crafted to build a Furnace.


• Upgrade to Stone Tools

Use your Furnace to smelt cobblestone into stone.

Craft Stone Tools from the stone to continue your progression.

</details>
